Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-29-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Interpleder/Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 220, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: Melinka/Sajja, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Casey A. Kaufman, Esq. for Plaintiff: The Law Offices of Thomas J. Brandi.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and declaration in support, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Kaiser Permanente, USCB Inc., American Medical response, Advanced Chiropractic Family Care, Sharon Barghi and Bahman Bibak.
See Attachment 7 in the Judgment for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
